qa_pairs.question: After configuring the Abaqus Western license, how should a user submit their jobs?
qa_pairs.answer: Once the Abaqus Western license is configured, users should submit their jobs as described in the "Cluster job submission" section.

qa_pairs.question: What details should a user include when contacting technical support about problems with the Abaqus Western license on the Dusky cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: If problems arise when using the Abaqus Western license on the Dusky cluster, users should submit a problem ticket to technical support, specifying that they are using the Abaqus Western license on Dusky, and provide the failed job number along with any applicable error messages.
